rationale.risk-routing: Learned policy dynamically tiers actions into silent, inspectable, or live review.
rationale.hitl-workflow: Action approvals, plan checkpoints, and revocable permissions provide developer control.
rationale.remediation-gating: Proposed code writes pass an approval cascade before execution.
rationale.rules-based-checks: CLI-enforced constraints, workflow-stage rules, and tests provide deterministic checks.
rationale.oversight-explanation: Check-ins explain their triggers and distinguish policy from agent initiation.
rationale.agent-scope-drift: Plan deviations, protected paths, and workflow-inappropriate actions trigger oversight.
rationale.provenance-auditability: Persistent traces and session reports expose decisions, approvals, denials, and verification.
rationale.framework: Architecture integrates learned routing, hard constraints, memory, and oversight checkpoints.
rationale.built-system: Authors implemented and released a working Python CLI prototype.
rationale.survey-input: Survey quantifies developers’ concerns and preferred check-in frequencies.
